texto: Maybe it was clear that he cared about me, that he couldn't handle another risk, but in that moment the only thing that made sense was my anger. I might have even hated him for what he said about Grace, because hating him was so much easier than understanding him. He obviously felt the same way.
explicacao: Citação de Lisa Roecker sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Maybe it was clear that he cared about me, that he couldn't handle another risk, but in that mome…” articula tempo, hate, kate-lowry em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como kate-lowry e liam-gilmour.
